scripts.dev: npm run predev && concurrently -n gateway,graph,algo,frontend -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev --workspace services/gateway-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/graph-service" "npm run dev --workspace services/algorithm-service" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
